'''R2-0''', known as '''Artoo-Oh''' or '''ArOh''', was the original prototype of the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. It was an ancient astromech [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with a [[Brass/Legends|brass]] casing, probably built well before [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

By [[36 ABY]], when [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] was purchased by [[Bornaryn Trading]], the droid was lying forgotten in a disused storage facility. [[Aryn Dro Thul|Aryn Thul]] tracked down the droid and presented it to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] as a goodwill gift. She hoped that they and slicer [[Zakarisz Ghent]] could use the [[OmniGate]] of its prototype [[Intellex IV/Legends|Intellex IV]] droid-brain to access further holofiles of Luke's mother, [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], in the sequestered sector of [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2's]] memory.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
